name: rifiuti2
title: rifiuti2

commands.name: rifiuti-vista

arguments.description: Present deletion time in time zone of local system (default is UTC)
arguments.raw: -z, --localtime       Present deletion time in time zone of local system (default is UTC)

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# rifiuti-vista -h
 Usage:
 rifiuti-vista [OPTION…] DIR_OR_FILE
 
 Parse index files in C:\$Recycle.bin style folder and dump recycle bin data.  Can also dump a single index file.
 
 Help Options:
 -h, --help            Show help options
 --help-all            Show all help options
 --help-format         Show output formatting options
 
 Application Options:
 -o, --output=FILE     Write output to FILE
 -z, --localtime       Present deletion time in time zone of local system (default is UTC)
 -v, --version         Print version information and exit
 --live                Inspect live system
 
 Usage help: https://github.com/abelcheung/rifiuti2/wiki/Usage-and-Examples
 Bug report: https://github.com/abelcheung/rifiuti2/issues
 More info : https://abelcheung.github.io/rifiuti2/

local_help.man:
rifiuti2(1)            Windows recycle bin analysis tool            rifiuti2(1)

NAME
     rifiuti2 -- Windows recycle bin analysis tool

SYNOPSIS
     rifiuti or rifiuti-vista [-h | -v | --help | --version]
     rifiuti [-l codepage] [-f xml | -f json | [-n] [-t delim]] [-z] [-o out-
     file] [--] info2_file
     rifiuti-vista [-f xml | -f json | [-n] [-t delim]] [-z] [-o outfile] [--]
     recycle_dir_or_file
     (for Windows and WSL) rifiuti-vista --live [-f xml | -f json | [-n] [-t
     delim]] [-z] [-o outfile]

DESCRIPTION
     This  manpage  is  now obsolete. Please read corresponding usage help from
     GitHub Wiki instead.

     *      https://github.com/abelcheung/rifiuti2/wiki/Usage-and-Examples

COPYRIGHT
     rifiuti2 is released under Revised BSD license.

AUTHOR
     The main author is Abel Cheung <abelcheung@gmail.com>

     The    original    author    of    rifiuti    is    Keith     J.     Jones
     <keith.jones@foundstone.com>

     Anthony Wong <ypwong@debian.org> helped in Debian packaging and was author
     of the original manpage.

0.8.2                               Jan 2024                        rifiuti2(1)
local_help.apropos: rifiuti-vista (1)    - Windows recycle bin analysis tool

binary_metadata.file_type: ELF 64-bit LSB pie executable, x86-64, version 1 (SYSV), dynamically linked, interpreter /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2, BuildID[sha1]=69ddc4c549f3afbdecb1d6eba99eb6f745753fb1, for GNU/Linux 3.2.0, stripped

apt_metadata.description:
replacement for rifiuti, a MS Windows recycle bin analysis tool
Rifiuti2 analyses recycle bin files from Windows. Analysis of Windows
recycle bin is usually carried out during Windows computer forensics.
.
Rifiuti2 can extract file deletion time, original path and size of deleted
files and whether the deleted files have been moved out from the recycle
bin since they are trashed.
.
Rifiuti2 is a rewrite of rifiuti, which is originally written for identical
purpose. Then it was extended to cover more functionalities, such as:
.
* Handles recycle bin up to Windows 10;
* Handles ancient Windows like 95, NT4 and ME;
* Supports all localized versions of Windows - both Unicode-based ones
and legacy ones (using ANSI code page);
* Supports output in XML format as well as original tab-delimited text.
.
Rifiuti2 is designed to be portable and runs on command line environment. Two
programs rifiuti and rifiuti-vista are chosen depending on relevant Windows
recycle bin format.

use_cases: Use as a candidate tool in the chain planner; review provenance before use.
Indexing only — no automated invocation. The operator must manually inspect the repository before adding to a toolchain.
